queue.title: FG video not updating on case→case Barba transitions
queue.note: Root cause confirmed: (1) bootCurrentView():1504 has !fgVideo.src guard — one-shot on direct load; (2) runAfterEnter():1669 never sets fgVideo.src on Barba transitions. Fix: add FG video population with URL equality check to runAfterEnter() case/work block, replace guard in bootCurrentView() for consistency. BG mirroring is free — startCaseBgDraw() draws from FG video via ctx.drawImage(). 1 file, ~20 LOC. Acceptance tests at tests/acceptance/fix-fg-video-case-to-case-barba.spec.js.

queue.title: Dial short-viewport bump: grow --dial-large to 63svh on 1440-1990 wide ≤849 tall
queue.note: CSS-only. One @media (min-width: 1440px) and (max-width: 1990px) and (max-height: 849px) block added after the default :root dial-size block in ready-hit-play.css, overriding --dial-large-width/height to 63svh. Step text 'Great stories made undeniable' actually measures 438.55px due to letter-spacing 5.63px (not the 376px the original spec assumed). At default 50svh this overflows (110% fill at 1440×800); at 63svh the dial grows to 504px and fill drops to ~87.0%. Shipped 65svh first, user requested slightly smaller on live 13" MBP review — settled on 63svh. Verify loop at 1440×800, 1440×849, 1440×850, 1440×900, 1920×1080, and 375×812 all PASS. Barba round-trip preserved via programmatic barba.go. 9 lines, one file. Barba impact: N/A (pure CSS).

queue.title: Work page prev/next navigation: wire published buttons to CMS list with cyclic wrap
queue.note: New work-nav.js IIFE module. On RHP.views.case.init: query .dial_cms-list .w-dyn-item, resolve current slug via [data-wf-item-slug] with location.pathname fallback, compute prev/next indices with modulo wrap, populate href on a[data-button='work-previous'] and a[data-button='work-next'] as /work/<slug>. Barba handles clicks natively. 3 files: new work-nav.js (~90 LOC), orchestrator.js (+2 lines in views.case.init/destroy), init.js (+3 lines: modules list, health check, version row). Acceptance test covers hrefs populated, cyclic wrap, Barba navigation, re-entry. Confidence 92%, Low complexity, sequential build.

queue.title: FG video preload: warm browser cache during case→home Barba leave phase
queue.note: Add _preloadFgVideos() helper in orchestrator.js. Creates hidden <video preload=auto/metadata> elements during beforeLeave for case→home. Prioritised: handoff sector + ±1 get auto, rest get metadata. Connection-gated: skip on 2g, limit on 3g. Cleanup in runAfterEnter. ~30 LOC, orchestrator.js only.

queue.title: About team scroll reveal: replace rAF mobile animation with per-element ScrollTrigger scrub
queue.note: Remove mobile team CSS layout overrides (rebuilt in Webflow), remove --team-photo-slide vars. Replace manual rAF+Lenis.onScroll mobile branch with per-element ScrollTrigger scrub (opacity:0+translateX:100% → opacity:1+translateX:0, image scale:1→1.05). Wire setupScrollTriggerProxy for about page. Add ScrollTrigger.refresh() to about boot path. Desktop hover unchanged. 4 tasks: CSS removal, proxy wiring, animation replacement, test updates.

queue.title: Dev/CDN source switch: URL param + localStorage toggle in init.js
queue.note: ~12 LOC in init.js only. ?rhp=local writes localStorage, ?rhp=cdn clears it. getBaseUrl() early-returns localhost when override active. Console indicator shows active source. One CDN deploy enables permanent dev/presentation switching.

queue.title: Memory leak fixes: video cleanup on destroy, orphaned listener prevention, static canvas draw-once
queue.note: 5 fixes: (1) pause+src-clear all videos in work-dial destroy(), (2) remove enforceVideoPolicy from applyActive(), (3) draw-once for about-dial-ticks + transition-dial RAF loops, (4) AbortController for canplay listeners, (5) null module-level refs. Root cause: videos not released on Barba transitions, accumulating decode contexts until browser caps out.

queue.title: About page cluster: scroll, text reveals, HIT logo hover, dial visibility fixes
queue.note: Fixed Lenis double-start orphaning scroll listeners, added gsap.context() to about-text-lines and hero/team hover, restored dial wrapper visibility after transitions, added selector document fallbacks, added prefers-reduced-motion guard to team hover.

queue.title: Case video: progress bar, viewport auto-pause with volume fade, auto-hide controls
queue.note: Consolidates feat-case-video-intersection + feat-video-controls-autohide. Adds clickable progress bar (teal #05EFBF fill, 0.5rem), IntersectionObserver viewport pause/resume with GSAP volume fade, and 2s idle auto-hide controls (tap-to-toggle on mobile). Modifies case-video-controls.js + ready-hit-play.css.

queue.note: setVideoSourceAndPoster already checks src equality but pool swap paths don't explicitly seek bg after swap. Add seek after didSwap = true in both pool swap branches.

queue.title: Video sync: add playPaired(fg, bg) + waitCanPlay() helpers; replace all independent fg/bg play() calls
queue.note: Call sites: applyActive() and setDialState(ACTIVE). Both currently play fg and bg independently.

queue.title: Video sync: pause videos when not visible — IDLE pauses fgVideo+bgVideo; ACTIVE pauses genericVideo; tab hidden pauses all
queue.note: setDialState(IDLE) must pause fgVideo + bgVideo. setDialState(ACTIVE) must pause genericVideo. onVis (tab hidden) must pause all active videos and resume on return. Pool videos (poolPrev/poolNext) are exempt — they play off-screen to stay buffered. Also pause outgoing visibleVideo when demoted to pool slot after a swap.

queue.title: Video sync: dedicated RAF drift monitor — pause ahead video if |fg - bg| > threshold; only runs in ACTIVE/ENGAGED
queue.note: Replace syncFgToBg() in draw() with a separate RAF loop scoped to dialState !== IDLE. Threshold: 0.1s desktop / 0.3s mobile. Use intentionallyPaused flag to avoid fighting tab-hidden or deliberate pauses. Cancel in cleanup/destroy.

queue.title: Video sync: GSAP 0.2s crossfade on project switch in applyActive() (skip if prefers-reduced-motion)
queue.note: No crossfade on IDLE↔ACTIVE transitions — genericVideo/bgVideo opacity changes are already instant and behind the dial.

queue.title: Video sync: QA adjacent switch, non-adjacent switch, IDLE↔ACTIVE transitions, tab hidden/return, Barba return, mobile sync
queue.note: Blocked on feat-bg-video-pool. Run after BG pool implementation ships — adjacent BG switches should then be instant (pool hit), non-adjacent 0.4s crossfade.

queue.title: Video sync: re-arch to parallel video elements — N fg + N bg elements loaded simultaneously, opacity switching
queue.note: Superseded by feat-bg-video-pool (sliding-window BG pool). Closed 2026-02-27.

queue.title: BG video sliding-window pool: bgPoolPrev/bgPoolNext in applyActive + setDialState uses bgVideoRef
queue.note: ROLLED BACK: 2026.2.27.6 added a 3-rAF re-sync in playPaired to close bg decode startup lag (~50ms on Remote client project). This made things worse — the visible lag between bg loading and playing increased. Reverted to 2026.2.27.5. The residual fractional delay on Remote client is a known limitation: bg decode latency is below the 0.1s drift threshold so the monitor never corrects it. If revisiting: try lowering drift threshold to 0.05s rather than the rAF re-sync approach.

queue.title: BG video pool: QA adjacent/non-adjacent switches, IDLE↔ACTIVE blur, drift monitor, Barba cleanup
Move dial_layer-fg outside Barba container — fix dial breaking after navigation
queue.note: Root cause: dial_layer-fg lives inside [data-barba='container'] and gets destroyed on every transition. Fix: move it outside (sibling of dial_layer-bg), then update ~13 CSS selectors (namespace→:has() wrapper), fix fgWrap query in work-dial.js, fix 2 orchestrator querySelector calls, add 3 document fallbacks in home-intro.js, remove homeIntro.skip() call, fix bgVisible cleanup on destroy. Requires Webflow Designer change first (move element, publish).

queue.title: Autoplay fallback (mobile): detect .play() rejection, show tap-to-play UI per context
queue.note: Inline detection per module (no new file). Homepage: swap step text to 'Tap here to play', revert after tap. Case with controls: keep UI visible until play tapped. Case without controls: SVG play overlay. Viewport auto-pause preserved, auto-resume after gesture unlock. 8 tasks across home-intro.js, work-dial.js, case-video-controls.js, orchestrator.js, CSS. Streams A+B+C parallelisable.

queue.title: GSAP Flip-based about transition: logo + dial reparenting, forward-only easing, overlay hold
queue.note: Replace manual pixel calculations with GSAP Flip for logo + dial positioning during home↔about transitions. Logo flips between .about-transition_logo-start ↔ .about-transition_logo-middle, dial between .about-transition_logo-middle ↔ .about_dial-wrapper. About→home plays forward (not reversed) with same power3.out easing. Overlay stays visible until work-dial ready on about→home. Add Flip.min.js to init.js deps. 9 steps: add Flip dep, remove manual helpers, rewrite transition functions, overlay hold logic, direct-land pre-positioning, remove resize invalidation, CSS cleanup, transition-dial resize, logo opacity. Supersedes feat-transition-layer-gsap-flip.

queue.title: Dial ACTIVE→ENGAGED: use circular bounding box for proximity/hit detection instead of square
queue.note: Already implemented — ACTIVE→ENGAGED uses Math.hypot circular distance check at work-dial.js:893-896. geom.videoR is min(width,height)/2. No additional work needed.

queue.title: Safari: HIT nav logo SVG appears larger than READY and PLAY
queue.note: Safari honours height="162" HTML attribute on SVG elements as the rendered height, overriding the 2rem flex container. HIT has the narrowest viewBox (316px vs 602/494), so preserveAspectRatio scaling makes its glyphs appear largest. Fix: .nav_logo-wrapper-2.is-nav svg { height: var(--logo-small-height); width: auto; } in ready-hit-play.css. CSS property beats HTML presentation attribute. Chrome unaffected.

queue.note: Test entry — delete after confirming time tracking works.

queue.title: Fake test plan 2 — time tracking validation round 2

queue.title: Optimise dial videos: re-encode fg at 720p, bg at 360p
queue.note: Background videos always shown with blur(40px) + scale(1.1) — 360p (640×360) sufficient for desktop, 270p for mobile. Foreground max render: desktop ~1632×918 CSS px (case panel 78vw×85dvh), mobile ~1125×633 CSS px (95vw×75dvh on 390px phone). Single-file approach: 720p fg + 360p bg. Per-device approach: desktop fg 720p/1080p, mobile fg 480p, desktop bg 360p, mobile bg 270p. Use H.264 MP4, CRF 23-28 (fg) / CRF 30-35 (bg), strip audio. Expected 70-80% file size reduction on bg videos.

queue.title: Case title entrance animation: container slide-up + word-level SplitText stagger on H1/H6
queue.note: Animate .section_case-title on case page entry (Barba afterEnter + direct land). Container slides up (opacity 0→1, y 40→0, 0.8s power3.out). H1/H6 words stagger in (yPercent -100→0, 0.6s power4.out, 0.225s stagger) overlapping container by 0.3s. Reset on destroy for clean re-entry. Added to orchestrator.js views.case IIFE. CSS word class in ready-hit-play.css.
